event: Abstract figure study referencing Adam and Eve
symbols: solitary standing figure — the human form stripped to its essence, vulnerability and nakedness
description: A minimalist ink drawing on a pale cream background. A single human figure stands at center, rendered in loose, gestural black ink strokes. The figure appears to be standing with weight on both legs, the torso and limbs suggested rather than fully delineated. The drawing is sparse and abstract, with drips and splashes of ink defining the form. A small shadow or mark appears at the figure's feet. The overall effect is of a human presence distilled to its most essential lines.
